description: Ownership of delivery and process improvements.

signals: I follow established team processes and deliver a consistent flow of features
I adhere to agreed standards (e.g., DoR, DoD)
examples: I ensure all my stories meet the Definition of Ready (DoR) and Definition of Done (DoD) before moving them to production
I follow the team's deployment process and maintain clear communication during releases

signals: I enforce and clarify team processes, ensuring everyone understands their benefits and trade-offs
I fit processes into lean/agile/project management principles
examples: I encourage active participation in retrospectives and sprint reviews, emphasizing the importance of continuous improvement and open feedback loops
I documented the trade-offs of our deployment policy and helped the team understand its benefits

signals: I challenge existing processes by identifying areas for improvement
I raise concerns about inefficiencies and advocate for quality practices (e.g., end-to-end tests, vendor coordination)
examples: I noticed we rely only on unit tests, so I proposed implementing end-to-end tests for better coverage, presenting data on defect rates to support my case
I highlighted vendor coordination gaps and suggested adjustments to improve delivery speed

signals: I adapt and refine team processes and vendor collaboration based on feedback and metrics
I guide the team through changes to balance delivery speed, quality, and vendor collaboration
examples: We realized requiring two approvals on each PR slowed us down without improving quality. I led the change to only one approval, monitoring throughput and defect rates to ensure effectiveness
I introduced release health reviews based on metrics and helped the team adjust the deployment cadence

signals: I design processes that match the team's maturity level
I align with lean/agile/project management methodologies and set up regular feedback loops for continuous improvement
examples: I created a disaster recovery process and playbook, ensuring we maintain both speed and quality. I also established vendor SLAs and collaboration frameworks to streamline delivery ownership
I designed a company-wide engineering operating model that balanced autonomy with alignment
